nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers between 3am and 5am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a low around 38. East wind 9 to 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Patchy Fog then Showers And Thunderstorms
nws_forecast.detailed: Patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers before 1pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a high near 57. South wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Rain Showers Likely then Mostly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain showers likely before 9pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 38. West wind 8 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 52. West wind 10 to 14 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Partly Cloudy then Slight Chance Rain And Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain between 2am and 4am, then a slight chance of rain and snow. Partly cloudy, with a low around 35. West wind 5 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain and snow showers. Partly sunny, with a high near 46. Northwest wind 6 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Snow Showers then Partly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers before 7pm, then a chance of rain between 7pm and 8pm, then a slight chance of snow showers between 8pm and 9pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 28. Northwest wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 44. North wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Clear, with a low around 33. South wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 55. South wind 8 to 13 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 41. Southwest wind 8 to 13 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 59. Southwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 41. Southwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
